assignments.twist: nonlinear Lur'e feedback (cross-coupled transconductor with a linear passive RLC/RC plant) engineered to sustain limit-cycle oscillations, certified via dominance/circle-criterion theory rather than a single linear forced ODE

core_model_summary: A cross-coupled analog feedback controller modeled as a Lur'e system that drives a linear passive RLC/RC plant into self-sustained oscillations, with oscillation conditions from dominant-system theory.
